get.summary: Retrieve a Shared Access Signature (SAS) for a specific document in a data space, using the dataSpaceId and optional file parameter.

parameters.name: dataSpaceId
parameters.description: The ID of the data space.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The optional file parameter.

get.summary: Get details for a file previously uploaded

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: File id

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Optional thread ID containing the file

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Optional workspace ID containing the file

post.summary: Upload files to be referenced in requests (supports full and chunked uploads)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: File id

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Optional thread ID containing the file

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Optional workspace ID containing the file

get.summary: Get URI of a previously uploaded file

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: File id

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Optional thread ID containing the file

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Optional workspace ID containing the file

post.summary: Add a new comment to a message in SmartSpace, using the message's ID and comment details in the request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message.

get.summary: Retrieve comments attached to a specific message in SmartSpace, using the message's ID, with pagination options 'take' and 'skip'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The maximum number of comments to retrieve (default is 50).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of comments to skip (default is 0).

post.summary:
Handles the HTTP POST request to create a new message in a thread within SmartSpace.
This method specifies details like workspace ID, thread ID, and message content in the request.

requestBody.description: The message request object containing the message content and other inputs.

delete.summary: Remove a specific message from SmartSpace using its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message to delete.

delete.summary: Delete a specific message thread from SmartSpace, using it's ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message thread to delete.

get.summary: Access messages within a specific message thread in SmartSpace, using the thread's ID, along with pagination options take and skip.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of messages to retrieve (default: 50).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of messages to skip (default: 0).

get.summary: Access messages within a specific message thread in SmartSpace, using the thread's ID, along with pagination options take and skip.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of messages to retrieve (default: 50).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of messages to skip (default: 0).

get.summary: Retrieves messages from a specific message thread along with the profile images of the users who created the messages.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message thread.

get.summary: Retrieves messages from a specific message thread along with the profile images of the users who created the messages.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message thread.

put.summary: Update the name of a message thread in SmartSpace, using the thread's ID and providing the new name in the request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message thread.

requestBody.description: The new name for the message thread.

put.summary: Mark a message thread as favorited or not in SmartSpace, using the thread's ID and a boolean value in the request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the chat thread.

post.summary: Submit a new comment to a specific message thread in SmartSpace, identified by the thread's ID, using the provided comment schema.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message thread.

get.summary: Retrieve comments from a specified message thread in SmartSpace, using the thread's ID, with take and skip for pagination control.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the message thread.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The maximum number of comments to retrieve (default is 50).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of comments to skip (default is 0).

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of models to retrieve.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of models to skip.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The search term to filter the models.

get.summary: Retrieves a model by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the model to retrieve.

get.summary: Retrieve detailed information about a specific workspace in SmartSpace, using its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the workspace to retrieve.

get.summary: Fetch a list of all workspaces in SmartSpace, with options for pagination through 'take' and 'skip' query parameters.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of workspaces to retrieve.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of workspaces to skip.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The search term to filter workspaces.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: The sort order for the returned workspaces.

get.summary: Retrieve the access control details of a specific workspace in SmartSpace, using the workspace's ID, with pagination options take and skip.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the workspace.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of access control details to retrieve.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of access control details to skip.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The search term to filter access controls.

get.summary: Retrieve all message threads associated with a specific workspace in SmartSpace, identified by workspaceId, with pagination options take and skip.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the workspace.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of message threads to retrieve.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of message threads to skip.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The term to filter threads by name or id.
